scope: Infrastructure only; no training or evaluation was run for this stage.
why_needed_after_stage159a: Stage159-A found useful Stage63 external prediction distributions without scalar fields, collapsed Stage158-A scalar exports, no obvious eval-only runner load path, and no verified loadable model-weight checkpoint artifact. Checkpoint-backed export infrastructure is required before recovered-vs-regressed scalar analysis can proceed.

checkpoint_save_support.checkpoint_format: torch.save dictionary with model_state_dict, architecture, vnext_router_mode, backbone, prediction_export_schema, label mapping, config metadata, safe training args snapshot, and Stage160 safety flags.

eval_only_external_scalar_export.purpose: Load a saved checkpoint, reconstruct the model from checkpoint metadata and CLI overrides, run external fact-verification JSONL prediction export, and emit available internal scalar fields.

safety_constraints.best_clean_dev_selection_source: internal clean/dev metrics already computed by the training run only

remaining_requirement: Future Stage161-A must run a sufficiently trained current-best configuration with --save-checkpoint-path, then use scripts/export_external_scalars_from_checkpoint.py to produce analysis-valid external scalar predictions.
